title: annesorhiza marlothii
intro: Annesorhiza marlothii, also known as Cape screwroot or screw root, is a plant species in the family Asphodelaceae, native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Annesorhiza marlothii include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its use as an anthelmintic to expel parasites. Annesorhiza marlothii is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
